title: IMPRESSIONS BY JULIANA DOUBLE PHOTO FRAME 8174 - 5x7
features: A beautifully simple silver plated hinged photo frame with narrow border to frame your photographs without distracting from them.
Featuring two 5" x 7" portrait apertures and luxury black velveteen backing.
Frame some of your most precious moments and memories in this simple, sleek freestanding double frame.
Makes a lovely gift when personalised with photographs of your choice.
